name: Safe synthetic playbook: CMMC control drift detection
description: Compliance posture simulation where assessed practices diverge from a CMMC-aligned control baseline on lab systems. Describes evidence gaps—no Controlled Unclassified Information content, no export-controlled material.

simulated_timeline.synthetic_narrative: GRC ingest compares lab asset inventory snapshots to CMMC practice expectations (fixture).
Missing artifact: multifactor enforcement evidence for LAB boundary users.
POA&M stub opened with synthetic due date.

payload.gap_summary: MFA attestations stale beyond policy window.

events_emitted.headline: Compliance finding raised
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Formal mapping ties drift to modeled CMMC practices only.

events_emitted.headline: Evidence review artifact
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Auditors receive checklist payload without regulated data payloads.

expected_agents_triggered.triggered_reason_synthetic: Framework mappings and corrective plans generated from drift signal.

expected_controls_triggered.control_label: LAB placeholder — authorized access enforcement evidence

expected_remediation.summary: Refresh MFA evidence artifacts, reconcile IdP configs with policy snapshots, attach auditor-friendly export (stub).

expected_autonomous_remediation.synthetic_action: Generate POA&M row with synthetic owner and due clock.

expected_human_approval_gates.synthetic_rationale: Human authorizes updates to lab system security plan narrative.

expected_final_report.title: CMMC control drift — synthetic playbook outcome
expected_final_report.synthetic_executive_summary: Modeled CMMC-aligned practices fell out of sync with collected evidence; output is a corrective plan, not authorization to operate.
